name: Working On It
short_description: Im Working On It ( the description )
detailed_description:
Use the rifle, sniper, pistol or grenades with infinite ammo to kill the workers. Climb on top of obstacles and take cover. If you get killed, you need to restart from the last checkpoint.

WORKING WITH:

- Difficult gameplay with the ability to learn and use your creativity

- Every gun from the start

- Infinite ammo

- Climbing and cover system

- Checkpoint ( worth the suffering )

NOTE

The game was inspired by getting over it. The gameplay is a lot different, but it has kind of the same feeling.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Turkish, Korean, Spanish - Latin America
